query:
SELECT
                    event_id,
                    resource_id as id,
                    resource_schema as "schema!",
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload as "payload!"
                FROM resource_events
                WHERE resource_schema = $1
                  AND ($2::bigint IS NULL OR event_id > $2)
                  AND ($3::bigint IS NULL OR event_id <= $3)
                ORDER BY event_id
